name: Skillet Chicken Paella (Diabetic)
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces chicken breast, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 medium sweet red pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from chicken breasts. Rinse and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Cut into bite-sized strips. In a 10-inch skillet, cook chicken strips, half at a time, in hot oil for 2 to 3 minutes or until no longer pink. Remove chicken from skillet.
3. Add onion and garlic to the skillet; cook until tender but not brown. Turn off heat.
4. Add broth, uncooked rice, oregano, paprika, salt, pepper, saffron, or turmeric. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat.
5. Simmer, covered, about 15 minutes.
6. Coarsely chop stewed tomatoes and add with their juice to the pan. Add sweet red pepper cut into strips and frozen peas. Cover and simmer about 5 more minutes, or until rice is tender.
7. Stir in cooked chicken. Cook and stir for 1 minute more, or until heated through.
8. Makes 6 main-dish servings.
